improvement: Added a static cross-check that compares the Cloudflare Pages deployment workflow against the committed GitHub environment contract.

verification.claim: The committed workflow source expresses the exact environment, secret-name references, Wrangler action, and Pages project required by the committed configuration contract.

evidence_strength: source-verified configuration intent plus deterministic contract tests
limits: This does not prove the GitHub environment exists.
This does not prove either secret is configured or valid.
This does not prove Cloudflare authorization, deployment, hostname resolution, or served identity.
No diagnosis or treatment claim is present.
falsification_route: Change the workflow environment, remove a required secret reference, change the Pages project, remove Wrangler v3, or introduce Vercel/payment coupling; the auditor must return workflow_contract_mismatch.
